---
title: "Exercises"
---

Hands-on tutorials for the workshop. Each one is a downloadable `.qmd` file with code, *Think about it* prompts, and collapsible answers --- open it in RStudio, point the data paths at your local copy of the dataset (see [Datasets](Datasets.qmd)), and run it chunk by chunk.

## Reading order

The five core tutorials below build on each other --- complete them in order. The bonus and template files can be skipped.

| # | Time | Prerequisites | What you'll have at the end |
|---|---|---|---|
| 01 | \~60 min | [Setup](Setup.qmd) complete | A QC'd, normalized Seurat object with HVGs |
| 02 | \~45 min | Tutorial 01 | A clustered UMAP embedding |
| 03 | \~45 min | Tutorial 02 | Cluster-marker tables and tentative cell-type labels |
| 04 | \~45 min | Tutorial 03 | Cell-type-resolved DE results from `DESeq2` |
| 05 | \~30 min | Tutorial 03 | Reference-mapped annotations from `SingleR` and Azimuth |

## scRNA-seq tutorial series

The standard **Seurat** scRNA-seq workflow on the public 10x **20k NSCLC DTC** dataset.

| # | Exercise | View | Download |
|---|---|---|---|
| 01 | QC & Preprocessing | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.qmd" download>Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.qmd</a> |
| 02 | Dimensionality Reduction & Clustering | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.qmd" download>Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.qmd</a> |
| 03 | Markers & Manual Cell-Type Annotation | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.qmd" download>Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.qmd</a> |
| 04 | Pseudobulk DE with DESeq2 | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_04_Pseudobulk_DE.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_04_Pseudobulk_DE.qmd" download>Tutorial_04_Pseudobulk_DE.qmd</a> |
| 05 | Reference-based Annotation (SingleR + Azimuth) | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_05_Reference_Annotation.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_05_Reference_Annotation.qmd" download>Tutorial_05_Reference_Annotation.qmd</a> |

### Lecture ↔ tutorial crosswalk

| Tutorial | Pairs with |
|---|---|
| 01 | [Lecture 02 --- Pre-processing](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_02_Preprocessing.html) |
| 02 | [Lecture 03 --- Dim-reduction, integration, clustering](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_03_DimRed_Integration_Clustering.html) |
| 03 | [Lecture 04 --- Annotation](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_04_Annotation.html) |
| 04 | [Lecture 05 --- Downstream analyses](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_05_Downstream.html) |
| 05 | [Lecture 04 --- Annotation](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_04_Annotation.html) |

## Bonus exercise

| # | Exercise | View | Download |
|---|---|---|---|
| B | scATAC-seq with Signac (PBMC 10k) | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.qmd" download>Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.qmd</a> |

Pairs with [Lecture 06 --- Beyond scRNA-seq](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_06_Beyond_scRNAseq.html).

## Computing on Talapas

A standalone tutorial on using SLURM (Talapas's job scheduler) --- interactive sessions and batch scripts, specific to UO. Recommended before running anything non-trivial on the cluster.

| Tutorial | View | Download |
|---|---|---|
| SLURM Basics on Talapas (UO) | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_SLURM_Basics.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_SLURM_Basics.qmd" download>Tutorial_SLURM_Basics.qmd</a> |

## Exercise template

| Exercise | View | Download |
|---|---|---|
| Blank template for your own exercise | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_Template.html) | <a href="Exercise_Folder/Exercise_Template.qmd" download>Exercise_Template.qmd</a> |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Datasets used

Full dataset descriptions, direct download links, and a disk-space budget live on the [Datasets](Datasets.qmd) page. Primary sources:

-   **scRNA-seq** --- [10x Genomics: 20k NSCLC DTC, 3' v3.1 Multiplex](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources/datasets/20-k-mixture-of-nsclc-dt-cs-from-7-donors-3-v-3-1-multiplex-3-1-standard-6-0-0)
-   **scATAC-seq** --- [10x Genomics: PBMC 10k scATAC-seq v1.1](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources/datasets/10-k-peripheral-blood-mononuclear-cells-pbm-cs-from-a-healthy-donor-next-gem-v-1-1-1-1-standard-2-0-0)

By convention the tutorials read from `../data/` (i.e. a `data/` folder at the repository root). Place your downloads there or adjust the paths in the `Read10X*` calls.
